data.reasoningText: The user wants to run specific tests filtered by a trait in their xUnit project. Let me look at the project files to understand the setup, then run the filtered tests.

arguments.description: Run xUnit tests with Category=Integration filter

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-560d75dabd45448fa17096e9e0bb2d4e && dotnet test --filter \"Category=Integration\" --no-restore 2>&1 | tail -20", "description": "Run xUnit tests with Category=Integration filter", "initial_wait": 30}

data.content:
All **5 integration tests** passed successfully. The command used:

```
dotnet test --filter "Category=Integration"
```

This uses the VSTest `--filter` syntax where `Category` maps to xUnit's `[Trait("Category", "Integration")]` attribute. All 5 matched tests succeeded with 0 failures.
